channel.title: morningNewsPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Over a dozen Dems demand Trump admin protect Iranians living in the US
item.description: Democrats signed a letter urging the Trump administration to shield Iranians in the U.S. who cannot safely return to the Middle Eastern nation.

item.title: Exclusive: After Federal Indictment, Watchdog Pushes IRS To Investigate SPLC’s Tax-Exempt Status
item.description: A government watchdog filed an updated IRS complaint on Thursday challenging the Southern Poverty Law Center’s (SPLC) tax-exempt status, The Federalis...

item.title: ‘Blatantly Dishonest Language’ On Virginia Ballots Fits Long Pattern Of Democrat Word Abuse
item.description: A judge blasted the Dems' flowery ballot language as 'flagrantly misleading', failing to 'accurately describe the proposed amendment.'

item.title: Trump admin steps up next phase of effort to protect children’s health
item.description: The Trump administration targets lead poisoning risks to children as the EPA reallocates unused state funds and launches new public awareness tools.

item.title: Mythos access by Discord group reveals real danger of AI-powered hacking
item.description: The unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos cybersecurity model wasn't just a breach.
